detailsModal.text1: 💵 HOW DO WE EARN SO MUCH MONEY?
detailsModal.text2: Explanation for beginners: why do we like working with Japan?
detailsModal.text3:
➡️ Japan is one of the world's leading countries in the field of cryptocurrencies, but the government has imposed a 50% tax on digital income.
➡️ It's no wonder that many investors and miners are unhappy with this change, as from now on, all crypto sales will be subject to significant tax liabilities.


❗️ WHAT IS HAPPENING IN THE CRYPTOCURRENCY MARKET? ❗️

➡️  Japanese investors whose cryptocurrency holdings have reached $400,000 are actively looking for ways to withdraw their money. To avoid high taxes, these investors often turn to partners outside the official exchanges.
➡️  We have the necessary experience and expertise to guarantee excellent results when working with these clients 👍
➡️  We purchase cryptocurrencies at a discount on the Japanese market. We then sell the cryptocurrencies at market price on US exchanges.


⬇️ LET'S TALK ABOUT THE NUMBERS, AND YOU'LL UNDERSTAND HOW IT WORKS:

➡️ On the Japanese exchange, we buy 0.0017 BTC for 171 AUD. On the US stock exchange, we sell 0.0017 BTC for 182 AUD. 
We have earned 11 AUD.
➡️ But our goal is not just to earn 11 AUD, but much more. That's why we repeat this process many times  ❗️ This is how we make big money together with you. You can easily see for yourself.

⬇️ IT ONLY TAKES 5 MINUTES OF YOUR TIME TO MAKE MONEY WITH ME. HERE'S WHAT YOU NEED TO DO:
detailsModal.text4:
STEP 1️⃣:

Send me a private message as soon as possible with the following text:
➡️ "I want to earn 6850 AUD" (your investment is 100 AUD)
➡️ "I want to earn 13100 AUD" (your investment is 160 AUD)
➡️ "I want to earn 25500 AUD" (your investment is 270 AUD)
 
STEP 2️⃣:

➡️ I consolidate all my clients' investments into a common fund and start trading between stock exchanges. I buy on the Japanese stock exchange and sell on the American stock exchange. And so on in a continuous cycle.

➡️ You are guaranteed to make a profit within 2 hours.

STEP 3️⃣:

I expect you to be honest and pay for my services. For helping you make money, I will charge 15% of the amount.


‼️ IT'S TIME TO MAKE MONEY! ‼️

We can only accept a limited number of investors each day. There are 50 spots left today!
More than 10,000 trades take place on the stock exchanges every day. Don't miss out!

✈️ Send me a message now, and I will help you get started!
